steps.title: Identify the scope signal
steps.content: The sentence says Zepeda's contributions "are ______" and then lists four distinct accomplishments: linguistics professor, bilingual poet, author of the first Tohono O'odham grammar book, and co-founder of the American Indian Language Development Institute. Four varied roles across academic, literary, scholarly, and institutional domains signal that the blank should describe breadth and scale.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'pragmatic': means concerned with practical matters rather than intellectual or artistic ones; the list includes poetry and co-founding an institute, which are not purely practical, so this does not fit. ✗
  • Choice B — 'controversial': means causing dispute; nothing in the passage suggests Zepeda's accomplishments are disputed or divisive. ✗
  • Choice C — 'extensive': means having wide or considerable scope; four accomplishments across four distinct domains directly support this claim. ✓
  • Choice D — 'universal': means covering everything in a category; a grammar book for one specific language and work at a single institute do not constitute coverage of all of linguistics. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
